canonical_definition: The observable behavior of a model shortening or summarizing a generated rationale or chain of thought, aiming to preserve its core logical steps while reducing length.
papers: Beyond Task-Oriented and Chitchat Dialogues: Proactive and Transition-Aware Conversational Agents

definitions.text: The observable behavior of a model shortening or summarizing a generated rationale or chain of thought, aiming to preserve its core logical steps while reducing length.
The observable act of replacing a verbose reasoning segment with a compact representation (e.g., gist tokens), discarding the original chain while continuing inference.
definitions.paper: Beyond Task-Oriented and Chitchat Dialogues: Proactive and Transition-Aware Conversational Agents

relationships.evidence: All rationales are generated and compressed via automated API-based models, and the datasets used are publicly available. (Section D1)

characterization: The observable behavior of a model shortening or summarizing a generated rationale or chain of thought, aiming to preserve its core logical steps while reducing length.

emnlp25: Beyond Task-Oriented and Chitchat Dialogues: Proactive and Transition-Aware Conversational Agents
